en: Salt me. Here you are, Homer.
What the? Why are you talking like that?
The play's tomorrow night. I've got to stay in character.
Hey, Mom, would it help if I talk like this, too? It might.
ko: 엄마, 나도 이렇게 말하면 도움이 될까? 될 수도 있지.

en: And I'll talk like this. Bob's your uncle, mate. That really doesn't help, Bob.
Big Daddy, would y'all mind passing a little old biscuit?
Can I slug off school tomorrow? Got a pain in me gulliver.
ko: 내일 학교 빠져도 돼? 머리가 아파.

en: I'm living in a cuckoo clock. See you later, kids. I've got to go rehearse with Ned.
But, Marge, what about dessert? For God's sakes, you can pull the lid off your own can of pudding.
Oh, no. My pudding is trapped forever.
So I can open my own can of pudding, can't I?
ko: 내가 푸딩 캔을 혼자 열 수 있다고?

en: Shows what you know, Marge. Marge!
Hey, Marge! Keep yelling, you big ape.
